mnemonics.title: Token Ring Key Features
mnemonics.content: Remember T-RING: Token circulates, Ring topology, Inherently collision-free, No priority inversion, Guaranteed bandwidth, Network efficiency depends on token speed.

mnemonics.title: Polling Components
mnemonics.content: Primary controls Secondary nodes, Invites sequentially, Polling list defines order, Only polled node transmits.

mnemonics.title: Token Bus Operation
mnemonics.content: Bus physical, Logical ring, MAC addresses in order, Token passes by address, Station knows successor.

acronyms.usage: Maximum duration a node can hold the token and transmit data (typically 10ms)
Layer 2 protocol sublayer that controls how devices gain access to the network medium
Expected time for token to complete one full rotation in the network
Timer used by nodes to monitor token arrival and detect token loss

visualTips.visualization: Draw a circle with nodes A, B, C, D. Show a small 'T' (token) moving clockwise. When T reaches a node, that node can send and draws an arrow showing frame transmission, then passes T to next node.
Draw a central primary node with lines radiating to secondary nodes A, B, C, D. Show poll frames going from Primary→A→Primary→B→Primary→C, with data frames following the same path.
Draw a horizontal bus with nodes attached. Draw a dashed circle overlay showing logical order: Node 1→Node 4→Node 2→Node 3→Node 1, indicating token follows MAC address order not physical position.

analogies.analogy: Think of a meeting where only the person holding the 'talking stick' can speak. The stick (token) passes person to person, ensuring only one person talks at a time.
Like a teacher calling on students in a classroom - only the called student can answer. The teacher (controller) decides who gets to speak.
Like booking a conference room in advance - you must reserve a time slot before using it. Only during your reserved time can you use the room.
Like a lost relay baton in a race. Officials (Active Monitor) notice the missing baton and start a new race (generate new token) to restore order.
